metadata.description: Agent Plugin marketplace for installable packs of agents and optional skills.

plugins.name: agent-pack-catalog
plugins.description: Meta pack for discovering/searching available agent packs in this marketplace.

plugins.name: atlas-orchestration-team
plugins.description: Optional distribution mirror of the canonical root Atlas pack. Installs the shared 19-agent orchestration surface (Atlas conductor + focused specialists) via the marketplace. The 7 root-only compatibility aliases are not included; the authoritative source remains .github/agents.

plugins.name: automation-mcp-workflow
plugins.description: Opt-in pack for automation, MCP server integration, and multi-step workflow composition. Inspired by n8n-MCP connector patterns and Superpowers modular packaging.

plugins.name: ux-enhancement-workflow
plugins.description: Opt-in pack for UX research, flow design, heuristic critique, and frontend handoff. Complements frontend-workflow without replacing it. Inspired by UI UX Pro Max and Everything Claude Code.
